scope: Cycle 20: Bug hunt C19 (0 bugs) + BUG-031 story_log + JourneyMapDisplay v2

All class references exist, all CRT_PALETTE keys exist, signal wiring correct, auto-discovery pattern robust. Found 1 MEDIUM bug (story_log data pipeline gap).
